title: INDIGI-KART
short: E-commerce platform for indigenous products — full stack
description:
• Built full-stack e-commerce platform enabling direct buyer–seller interactions.
• Developed backend services using Java, Spring Boot, and Hibernate.
• Implemented seller verification using GI certificates to ensure product authenticity.
• Integrated secure payment flow and data encryption for transaction safety.
• Optimized application performance and responsiveness across devices.
• Used Cloudinary for scalable product image storage and delivery.

title: E-Book Management System
short: Secure e-book purchases with Google OAuth and role-based access.
description:
• Developed RESTful backend APIs using Java and Spring Boot.
• Built responsive frontend using React.js.
• Implemented Google OAuth2–based authentication and role-based access control.
• Integrated SMTP-based forgot-password workflow.
• Used Cloudinary for scalable image management.
• Enabled secure e-book purchase and management functionality.

title: AutoTestGen (AI-assisted)
short: Prototype that generates UI test skeletons using AI prompts.
description: An experimental tool that uses AI to generate Playwright test skeletons from user stories; demonstrates AI-assisted development workflows.
